win_condition: Players win immediately when all 4 disease cures are discovered before any loss condition is triggered.
tiebreaker: Not applicable; game is cooperative and resolves as win or loss.

categories.label: Four Cures Discovered
categories.description: Primary win condition: discover cures for all four diseases.

categories.label: Diseases Eradicated
categories.description: Track optional achievement count of eradicated diseases (for post-game performance).

categories.label: Remaining Player Cards
categories.description: Optional difficulty/performance metric: cards left in player deck when game ends.
